10% chance that targets will flinch.

every turn.

name: Battle Armor
description: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.
official_desc: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.

name: Sturdy
description:
If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that
would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP.
The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.
official_desc:
If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that
would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP.
The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. Immune to OHKO.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. OHKO moves fail when used against this Pokemon.

name: Damp

official_desc:

pkmn_desc: While this Pokemon is active, Explosion, Mind Blown, Misty Explosion, Self-Destruct, and the Aftermath Ability are prevented from having an effect.

pkmn_desc: If Sandstorm is active, the accuracy of moves used against this Pokemon is multiplied by 0.8. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

name: Static

official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a
30% chance of being paralyzed.
pkmn_shortDesc: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be paralyzed.

official_desc: Eliminates the effects of weather.
pkmn_shortDesc: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.

name: Flash Fire

Fire-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
give the Pokémon the Flash Fire status.
official_desc:
Fire-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
give the Pokémon the Flash Fire status.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Fire attacks do 1.5x damage if hit by one Fire move; Fire immunity.

name: Shield Dust
description: The Pokémon is immune to additional effects from attacks.
official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to additional effects from attacks.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack. Attacks with secondary effects that are prevented include those with a chance (even 100%) to paralyze, sleep, freeze, burn, poison, confuse, cause this Pokemon to flinch, cause this Pokemon's stat stages to be lowered, as well as Anchor Shot, Eerie Spell, Fling, Psychic Noise, Salt Cure, Spirit Shackle, Syrup Bomb, and Throat Chop. The effect of Sparkling Aria is prevented if this Pokemon is the only target. Secondary effects added by King's Rock, Razor Fang, and the Poison Touch, Stench, and Toxic Chain Abilities are also prevented against this Pokemon.

name: Own Tempo

name: Shadow Tag

official_desc: Opponents cannot be switched out of battle.

pkmn_desc: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell, are a Ghost type, or also have this Ability.

Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes,
and Sticky Web statuses.

The effects of Gravity, Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball nullify the immunity. Thousand Arrows can hit this Pokemon as if it did not have this Ability.

boost its Speed stat by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by an Electric move; Electric immunity.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Speed by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move.

name: Rivalry
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 25% against
targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets
of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if
either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 25% against
targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets
of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if
either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks do 1.25x on same gender targets; 0.75x on opposite gender.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's attacks have their power multiplied by 1.25 against targets of the same gender or multiplied by 0.75 against targets of the opposite gender. There is no modifier if either this Pokemon or the target is genderless.

name: Steadfast
description:
When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by
1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by
1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon flinches, its Speed is raised by 1 stage.

name: Snow Cloak
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow.
official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x.
pkmn_desc: If Snow is active, the accuracy of moves used against this Pokemon is multiplied by 0.8.

name: Gluttony
description:
If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops
to 1/4 or less of its max, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP
drops to 1/2 or less of its max.
official_desc:
If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops
to 1/4 or less of its max, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP
drops to 1/2 or less of its max.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon eats Berries at 1/2 max HP or less instead of their usual 1/4 max HP.
pkmn_desc: When this Pokemon is holding a Berry that usually activates with 1/4 or less of its maximum HP, it is eaten at 1/2 or less of its maximum HP instead.

name: Anger Point
description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat to its sixth stage when the
Pokémon takes a critical hit.
official_desc:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat to its sixth stage when the
Pokémon takes a critical hit.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon (not its substitute) takes a critical hit, its Attack is raised 12 stages.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon, but not its substitute, is struck by a critical hit, its Attack is raised by 12 stages.

name: Unburden
description:
Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is
consumed or lost.
official_desc:
Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is
consumed or lost.
pkmn_shortDesc: Speed is doubled on held item loss; boost is lost if it switches, gets new item/Ability.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon loses its held item for any reason, its Speed is doubled as long as it remains active, has this Ability, and is not holding an item.

name: Heatproof
description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and from being burned.
official_desc:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and from being burned.
pkmn_shortDesc: Fire damage against this Pokemon is dealt with 1/2 offensive stat; 1/2 burn damage.
pkmn_desc: If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon takes half of the usual burn damage, rounded down.

name: Simple
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s stat changes.
official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s stat changes.
pkmn_shortDesc: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages is raised or lowered, the amount is doubled.

name: Dry Skin
description:
Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP. However, the Pokémon takes 25%
more damage from Fire-type moves. The Pokémon has 1/8 of
its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain, but it loses
1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.
official_desc:
Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP. However, the Pokémon takes 25%
more damage from Fire-type moves. The Pokémon has 1/8 of
its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain, but it loses
1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is healed 1/4 by Water, 1/8 by Rain; is hurt 1.25x by Fire, 1/8 by Sun.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is immune to Water-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by a Water-type move. The power of Fire-type moves is multiplied by 1.25 when used on this Pokemon. At the end of each turn, this Pokemon restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Rain Dance, and loses 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Sunny Day. The weather effects are prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

name: Iron Fist
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s punching moves by 20%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s punching moves by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have 1.2x power. Sucker Punch is not boosted.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have their power multiplied by 1.2.

name: Poison Heal
description:
If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has 1/8 of its max
HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.
official_desc:
If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has 1/8 of its max
HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is poisoned, it restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn instead of losing HP.

name: Adaptability
description:
Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by
100% instead of 50%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by
100% instead of 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's same-type attack bonus (STAB) is 2 instead of 1.5.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's moves that match one of its types have a same-type attack bonus (STAB) of 2 instead of 1.5.

name: Skill Link
description:
The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the maximum
number of times.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the maximum
number of times.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times. Triple Kick and Triple Axel do not check accuracy for the second and third hits.

name: Hydration
description:
Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every
turn in rain.
official_desc:
Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every
turn in rain.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon has its status cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

name: Solar Power
description:
In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50%,
but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn.
official_desc:
In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50%,
but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x; loses 1/8 max HP per turn.
pkmn_desc: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5 and it loses 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. These effects are prevented if the Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

name: Quick Feet
description:
When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is
boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the
Pokémon’s Speed stat.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is
boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the
Pokémon’s Speed stat.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is statused, its Speed is 1.5x; ignores Speed drop from paralysis.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Speed is multiplied by 1.5. This Pokemon ignores the paralysis effect of halving Speed.

name: Sniper
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125%
instead of 50%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125%
instead of 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.

name: Magic Guard
description: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.
official_desc: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks. Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, Struggle recoil, and confusion damage are considered direct damage.

name: No Guard
description:
The accuracy of moves used both by and against the Pokémon
becomes 100%.
official_desc:
The accuracy of moves used both by and against the Pokémon
becomes 100%.
pkmn_shortDesc: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.

name: Stall
description: The Pokémon’s moves go last among moves of the same priority.
official_desc: The Pokémon’s moves go last among moves of the same priority.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon moves last among Pokemon using the same or greater priority moves.

name: Technician
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their
power is 60 or less.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their
power is 60 or less.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have 1.5x power, including Struggle.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have their power multiplied by 1.5, including Struggle. This effect comes after a move's effect changes its own power.

name: Leaf Guard
description: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.
official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot be statused and Rest will fail for it.
pkmn_desc: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn, and Rest will fail for it. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

name: Klutz
description: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.
official_desc: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's held item has no effect, except Macho Brace. Fling cannot be used.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's held item has no effect. This Pokemon cannot use Fling successfully. Macho Brace, Power Anklet, Power Band, Power Belt, Power Bracer, Power Lens, and Power Weight still have their effects.

name: Mold Breaker
description:
The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the
target (with certain exceptions).
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the
target (with certain exceptions).
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore certain Abilities of other Pokemon. The Abilities that can be negated are Armor Tail, Aroma Veil, Aura Break, Battle Armor, Big Pecks, Bulletproof, Clear Body, Contrary, Damp, Dazzling, Disguise, Dry Skin, Earth Eater, Filter, Flash Fire, Flower Gift, Flower Veil, Fluffy, Friend Guard, Fur Coat, Good as Gold, Grass Pelt, Guard Dog, Heatproof, Heavy Metal, Hyper Cutter, Ice Face, Ice Scales, Illuminate, Immunity, Inner Focus, Insomnia, Keen Eye, Leaf Guard, Levitate, Light Metal, Lightning Rod, Limber, Magic Bounce, Magma Armor, Marvel Scale, Mind's Eye, Mirror Armor, Motor Drive, Multiscale, Oblivious, Overcoat, Own Tempo, Pastel Veil, Punk Rock, Purifying Salt, Queenly Majesty, Sand Veil, Sap Sipper, Shell Armor, Shield Dust, Simple, Snow Cloak, Solid Rock, Soundproof, Sticky Hold, Storm Drain, Sturdy, Suction Cups, Sweet Veil, Tangled Feet, Telepathy, Tera Shell, Thermal Exchange, Thick Fat, Unaware, Vital Spirit, Volt Absorb, Water Absorb, Water Bubble, Water Veil, Well-Baked Body, White Smoke, Wind Rider, Wonder Guard, and Wonder Skin. This affects every other Pokemon on the field, whether or not it is a target of this Pokemon's move, and whether or not their Ability is beneficial to this Pokemon.

name: Super Luck
description: The Pokémon has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
official_desc: The Pokémon has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's critical hit ratio is raised by 1 stage.

name: Aftermath
description:
Attackers that knock out the Pokémon with a contact move take
damage equal to 1/4 of their max HP.
official_desc:
Attackers that knock out the Pokémon with a contact move take
damage equal to 1/4 of their max HP.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down. This effect is prevented if the move's user has the Magic Guard Ability or if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.

name: Anticipation
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the
opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super
effective against it.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the
opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super
effective against it.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon shudders if any foe has a supereffective or OHKO move.
pkmn_desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted if any opposing Pokemon has an attacking move with a type that is super effective against this Pokemon, or any OHKO move. This effect considers Hidden Power to be its determined type, and every other move to be its original type.

name: Forewarn
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies the move with
the highest power among all the moves the opponents know.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies the move with
the highest power among all the moves the opponents know.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the foes' move with the highest power.
pkmn_desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the move with the highest power, at random, known by an opposing Pokemon. This effect considers OHKO moves to have 150 power, Counter, Mirror Coat, and Metal Burst to have 120 power, every other attacking move with an unspecified power to have 80 power, and non-damaging moves to have 1 power.

name: Unaware
description:
The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking,
and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked.
It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.
official_desc:
The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking,
and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked.
It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon ignores other Pokemon's stat stages when taking or doing damage.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon ignores other Pokemon's Attack, Special Attack, and accuracy stat stages when taking damage, and ignores other Pokemon's Defense, Special Defense, and evasiveness stat stages when dealing damage.

name: Filter
description:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.
official_desc:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

name: Scrappy
description:
The Pokémon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and
Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.
official_desc:
The Pokémon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and
Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.
pkmn_shortDesc: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Immune to Intimidate.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.

name: Ice Body
description:
The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of
every turn in snow.
official_desc:
The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of
every turn in snow.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
pkmn_desc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn.

name: Solid Rock
description:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.
official_desc:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

name: Snow Warning
description: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.
official_desc: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Snow.

name: Frisk
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies opponents’
held items.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies opponents’
held items.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.

name: Reckless
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 20% if they have
recoil or crash damage.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 20% if they have
recoil or crash damage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have 1.2x power; not Struggle.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have their power multiplied by 1.2. Does not affect Struggle.

name: Pickpocket
description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal the
held item of the attacker if it is not already holding an item.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal the
held item of the attacker if it is not already holding an item.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

name: Sheer Force
description:
The Pokémon’s moves lose their additional effects, but the
power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s moves lose their additional effects, but the
power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have 1.3x power; nullifies the effects.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have their power multiplied by 1.3, but the secondary effects are removed. If a secondary effect was removed, it also removes the user's Life Orb recoil and Shell Bell recovery, and prevents the target's Anger Shell, Berserk, Color Change, Emergency Exit, Pickpocket, Wimp Out, Red Card, Eject Button, Kee Berry, and Maranga Berry from activating.

name: Contrary
description:
Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that
attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts
to lower its stats will boost them.
official_desc:
Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that
attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts
to lower its stats will boost them.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon has a stat stage raised it is lowered instead, and vice versa.

name: Unnerve
description: Makes opponents unable to eat Berries.
official_desc: Makes opponents unable to eat Berries.
pkmn_shortDesc: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries.
pkmn_desc: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect.

name: Defiant
description:
When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent,
its Attack stat is boosted by 2 stages.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent,
its Attack stat is boosted by 2 stages.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 2 stages for each of its stat stages that is lowered by an opposing Pokemon.

name: Cursed Body
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has
a 30% chance of gaining the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has
a 30% chance of gaining the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, there is a 30% chance that move gets disabled.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, there is a 30% chance that move gets disabled unless one of the attacker's moves is already disabled.

name: Healer
description:
The Pokémon has a 50% chance of curing the status conditions
of its allies at the end of every turn.
official_desc:
The Pokémon has a 50% chance of curing the status conditions
of its allies at the end of every turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.
pkmn_desc: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.

name: Friend Guard
description: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.
official_desc: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.

name: Weak Armor
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its
Defense stat is lowered by 1 stage, but its Speed stat is boosted
by 2 stages.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its
Defense stat is lowered by 1 stage, but its Speed stat is boosted
by 2 stages.
pkmn_shortDesc: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.
pkmn_desc: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, its Defense is lowered by 1 stage and its Speed is raised by 2 stages.

name: Heavy Metal
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.
official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's weight is doubled.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's weight is doubled. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone.

name: Light Metal
description: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.
official_desc: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's weight is halved.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's weight is halved, rounded down to a tenth of a kilogram. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone. A Pokemon's weight will not drop below 0.1 kg.

name: Multiscale
description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.
official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

name: Harvest
description:
If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating
another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the
Pokémon will definitely create a Berry.
official_desc:
If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating
another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the
Pokémon will definitely create a Berry.
pkmn_shortDesc: If last item used is a Berry, 50% chance to restore it each end of turn. 100% in Sun.
pkmn_desc: If the last item this Pokemon used is a Berry, there is a 50% chance it gets restored at the end of each turn. If Sunny Day is active, this chance is 100%.

name: Telepathy
description: The Pokémon dodges attacks from its allies.
official_desc: The Pokémon dodges attacks from its allies.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon does not take damage from attacks made by its allies.

name: Moody
description:
At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be
boosted by 2 stages, but another will be lowered by 1 stage.
official_desc:
At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be
boosted by 2 stages, but another will be lowered by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Boosts a random stat (except accuracy/evasion) +2 and another stat -1 every turn.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon has a random stat, other than accuracy or evasiveness, raised by 2 stages and another stat lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.

name: Overcoat
description:
The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms and is immune
to moves and Abilities involving powder.
official_desc:
The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms and is immune
to moves and Abilities involving powder.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, damage from Sandstorm, and the effects of Rage Powder and the Effect Spore Ability.

name: Poison Touch
description:
When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target
has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target
has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning. This effect comes after a move's inherent secondary effect chance.

name: Regenerator
description:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it switches
out of battle.
official_desc:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it switches
out of battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.

name: Big Pecks
description:
The Pokémon’s Defense stat cannot be lowered by other
Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s Defense stat cannot be lowered by other
Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.
pkmn_shortDesc: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Defense stat stage.

name: Sand Rush
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm.
official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled; immunity to Sandstorm.
pkmn_desc: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

name: Analytic
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 30% when the
Pokémon is the last to move that turn.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 30% when the
Pokémon is the last to move that turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks have 1.3x power if it is the last to move in a turn.
pkmn_desc: The power of this Pokemon's move is multiplied by 1.3 if it is the last to move in a turn. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight.

name: Illusion
description:
The Pokémon enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its
party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage
from a move.
official_desc:
The Pokémon enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its
party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage
from a move.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon appears as the last Pokemon in the party until it takes direct damage.
pkmn_desc: When this Pokemon switches in, it appears as the last unfainted Pokemon in its party until it takes direct damage from another Pokemon's attack. This Pokemon's actual level and HP are displayed instead of those of the mimicked Pokemon.

name: Imposter
description:
The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also
copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP.
official_desc:
The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also
copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it.
pkmn_desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it. If there is no Pokemon at that position, this Pokemon does not Transform.

name: Infiltrator
description:
When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of
targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and
substitutes.
official_desc:
When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of
targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and
substitutes.
pkmn_shortDesc: Moves ignore substitutes and foe's Reflect/Light Screen/Safeguard/Mist/Aurora Veil.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's moves ignore substitutes and the opposing side's Reflect, Light Screen, Safeguard, Mist, and Aurora Veil.

name: Mummy
description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its
Ability changed to Mummy.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its
Ability changed to Mummy.
pkmn_shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Mummy.
pkmn_desc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Mummy. Does not affect Pokemon with the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Mummy, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.

name: Moxie
description:
When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.

name: Justified
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.

name: Magic Bounce
description:
Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves,
the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.
official_desc:
Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves,
the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon blocks certain Status moves and bounces them back to the user.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is unaffected by certain non-damaging moves directed at it and will instead use such moves against the original user. Moves reflected in this way are unable to be reflected again by this or Magic Coat's effect. Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes can only be reflected once per side, by the leftmost Pokemon under this or Magic Coat's effect. The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this Ability takes effect.

name: Sap Sipper
description:
Grass-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
boost its Attack stat by 1 stage.
official_desc:
Grass-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
boost its Attack stat by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Attack is raised 1 stage if hit by a Grass move; Grass immunity.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is immune to Grass-type moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a Grass-type move.

name: Prankster
description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s status moves by 1 stage.
official_desc: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s status moves by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by 1. Opposing Dark-type Pokemon are immune to these moves, and any move called by these moves, if the resulting user of the move has this Ability.

name: Sand Force
description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-, Ground-, and
Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-, Ground-, and
Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Ground/Rock/Steel attacks do 1.3x in Sandstorm; immunity to it.
pkmn_desc: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Ground-, Rock-, and Steel-type attacks have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

name: Aroma Veil
description:
The Pokémon and its allies cannot gain the Infatuated, Taunted,
Unable to Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, or
Encore statuses.
official_desc:
The Pokémon and its allies cannot gain the Infatuated, Taunted,
Unable to Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, or
Encore statuses.
pkmn_shortDesc: Protects user/allies from Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, and Torment.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon and its allies cannot become affected by Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, or Torment.

name: Flower Veil
description:
Grass-type allies are immune to status conditions and cannot
have their stats lowered.
official_desc:
Grass-type allies are immune to status conditions and cannot
have their stats lowered.
pkmn_shortDesc: This side's Grass types can't have stats lowered or status inflicted by other Pokemon.
pkmn_desc: Grass-type Pokemon on this Pokemon's side cannot have their stat stages lowered by other Pokemon or have a non-volatile status condition inflicted on them by other Pokemon.

name: Cheek Pouch
description:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it eats a
Berry, in addition to the Berry’s usual effect.
official_desc:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it eats a
Berry, in addition to the Berry’s usual effect.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon eats a Berry, it restores 1/3 of its max HP after the Berry's effect.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon eats a held Berry, it restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, in addition to the Berry's effect. This effect can also activate after the effects of Bug Bite, Fling, Pluck, Stuff Cheeks, and Teatime if the eaten Berry had an effect on this Pokemon.

name: Protean
description:
Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s
about to use. This works only once per time the Pokémon
enters battle.
official_desc:
Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s
about to use. This works only once per time the Pokémon
enters battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.

name: Fur Coat
description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.
official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Defense is doubled.

name: Magician
description:
If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, it will steal the
held item from targets it deals damage to with its moves.
official_desc:
If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, it will steal the
held item from targets it deals damage to with its moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight. If multiple targets are hit by an attack the item is stolen from the fastest Pokemon, while considering the effect of Trick Room and prioritizing opposing Pokemon before allies.

name: Bulletproof
description: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.
official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to bullet moves.

name: Competitive
description:
When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent,
its Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 2 stages.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent,
its Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 2 stages.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Special Attack is raised by 2 stages for each of its stat stages that is lowered by an opposing Pokemon.

name: Strong Jaw
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s biting moves by 50%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s biting moves by 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have 1.5x power. Bug Bite is not boosted.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have their power multiplied by 1.5.

name: Refrigerate
description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Ice type and have 1.2x power.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

name: Sweet Veil
description:
The Pokémon and its allies cannot become drowsy or be
put to sleep.
official_desc:
The Pokémon and its allies cannot become drowsy or be
put to sleep.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies cannot fall asleep; those already asleep do not wake up.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon and its allies cannot fall asleep, but those already asleep do not wake up immediately. This Pokemon and its allies cannot use Rest successfully or become affected by Yawn, and those previously affected will not fall asleep.

name: Stance Change
description:
The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks
and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move
King’s Shield.
official_desc:
The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks
and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move
King’s Shield.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Aegislash, changes Forme to Blade before attacks and Shield before King's Shield.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is an Aegislash, it changes to Blade Forme before using an attacking move, and changes to Shield Forme before using King's Shield.

name: Gale Wings
description:
Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s Flying-type moves by
1 stage while its HP is full.
official_desc:
Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s Flying-type moves by
1 stage while its HP is full.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.

name: Mega Launcher
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s pulse moves by 50%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s pulse moves by 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's pulse moves have 1.5x power. Heal Pulse heals 3/4 target's max HP.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's pulse moves have their power multiplied by 1.5. Heal Pulse restores 3/4 of a target's maximum HP, rounded half down.

name: Symbiosis
description:
When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held
item to that ally.
official_desc:
When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held
item to that ally.
pkmn_shortDesc: If an ally uses its item, this Pokemon gives its item to that ally immediately.
pkmn_desc: If an ally uses its item, this Pokemon gives its item to that ally immediately. Does not activate if the ally's item was stolen or knocked off, or if the ally used an Eject Button or Eject Pack.

name: Tough Claws
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s contact moves by 30%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s contact moves by 30%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves have their power multiplied by 1.3.

name: Pixilate
description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

name: Gooey
description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

name: Aerilate
description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying type and have 1.2x power.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

name: Parental Bond
description:
The parent and child attack one after the other. The power of
the child’s attacks is 1/4 of those of the parent.
official_desc:
The parent and child attack one after the other. The power of
the child’s attacks is 1/4 of those of the parent.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's damaging moves hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's damaging moves become multi-hit moves that hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered. Does not affect Doom Desire, Dragon Darts, Dynamax Cannon, Endeavor, Explosion, Final Gambit, Fling, Future Sight, Ice Ball, Rollout, Self-Destruct, any multi-hit move, any move that has multiple targets, or any two-turn move.

name: Fairy Aura
description:
Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the
field by 33%.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the
field by 33%.
pkmn_shortDesc: While this Pokemon is active, a Fairy move used by any Pokemon has 1.33x power.
pkmn_desc: While this Pokemon is active, the power of Fairy-type moves used by active Pokemon is multiplied by 1.33.

name: Stamina
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat
is boosted by 1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat
is boosted by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Defense is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a move.

name: Merciless
description:
The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is
poisoned or badly poisoned.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is
poisoned or badly poisoned.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.

name: Water Bubble
description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon
cannot be burned.
official_desc:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon
cannot be burned.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's offensive stat is doubled while using a Water-type attack. If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

name: Berserk
description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage when an attack
causes its HP to drop to 1/2 or less of its max.
official_desc:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage when an attack
causes its HP to drop to 1/2 or less of its max.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 when it reaches 1/2 or less of its max HP.
pkmn_desc: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage from an attack bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, its Special Attack is raised by 1 stage. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

name: Slush Rush
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in snow.
official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in snow.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

name: Long Reach
description:
None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered
contact moves.
official_desc:
None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered
contact moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.

name: Liquid Voice

official_desc: The Pokémon’s sound-based moves become Water-type moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water type.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water-type moves. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

name: Surge Surfer
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.
official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Electric Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

name: Disguise
description:
When the Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and would take
damage from a move, it loses 1/8 of its max HP instead of
taking the damage, then changes into its Busted Form.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and would take
damage from a move, it loses 1/8 of its max HP instead of
taking the damage, then changes into its Busted Form.
pkmn_shortDesc: (Mimikyu only) The first hit it takes is blocked, and it takes 1/8 HP damage instead.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is a Mimikyu, the first hit it takes in battle deals 0 neutral damage. Its disguise is then broken, it changes to Busted Form, and it loses 1/8 of its max HP. Confusion damage also breaks the disguise.

name: Corrosion
description:
The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re
Steel or Poison types.
official_desc:
The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re
Steel or Poison types.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon can poison or badly poison a Pokemon regardless of its typing.

name: Queenly Majesty
description:
Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the
Pokémon or its allies.
official_desc:
Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the
Pokémon or its allies.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
pkmn_desc: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

name: Innards Out
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it
out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it
out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is KOed with a move, that move's user loses an equal amount of HP.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a move, that move's user loses HP equal to the amount of damage inflicted on this Pokemon.

name: Fluffy
description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from contact moves, but
doubles the damage taken from Fire-type moves.
official_desc:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from contact moves, but
doubles the damage taken from Fire-type moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon takes 1/2 damage from contact moves, 2x damage from Fire moves.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from contact moves, but double damage from Fire moves.

name: Tangling Hair
description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

name: Receiver
description:
The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a
defeated ally.
official_desc:
The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a
defeated ally.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.

name: Electric Surge
description:
Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the
Pokémon enters a battle.
official_desc:
Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the
Pokémon enters a battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Electric Terrain.

name: Mirror Armor
description:
Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon
bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.
official_desc:
Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon
bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered, the attacker's are lowered instead.
pkmn_desc: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered by another Pokemon, that Pokemon's stat stage is lowered instead. This effect does not happen if this Pokemon's stat stage was already -6. If the other Pokemon has a substitute, neither Pokemon has its stat stage lowered.

name: Stalwart
description:
The Pokémon ignores the effects of Abilities and moves that
draw in moves.
official_desc:
The Pokémon ignores the effects of Abilities and moves that
draw in moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

name: Sand Spit
description:
Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes
damage from moves.
official_desc:
Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes
damage from moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.

name: Ripen
description: Doubles the effects of Berries eaten by the Pokémon.
official_desc: Doubles the effects of Berries eaten by the Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled.
pkmn_desc: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled. Berries that restore HP or PP have the amount doubled, Berries that raise stat stages have the amount doubled, Berries that halve damage taken quarter it instead, and a Jaboca Berry or Rowap Berry has the attacker lose 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down.

name: Mimicry
description: The Pokémon’s type changes depending on the terrain.
official_desc: The Pokémon’s type changes depending on the terrain.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's types change to match the Terrain. Type reverts when Terrain ends.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's types change to match the active Terrain when this Pokemon acquires this Ability, or whenever a Terrain begins. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain. If this Ability is acquired without an active Terrain, or a Terrain ends, this Pokemon's types become the original types for its species.

name: Screen Cleaner
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes the Light Screen,
Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes the Light Screen,
Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, the effects of Aurora Veil, Light Screen, and Reflect end for both sides.

name: Wandering Spirit
description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities
with the attacker.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities
with the attacker.
pkmn_shortDesc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one.
pkmn_desc: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one. Does not affect Pokemon with the Abilities As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

name: Hunger Switch
description:
The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly
Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of every turn.
official_desc:
The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly
Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of every turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: If Morpeko, it changes between Full Belly and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.
pkmn_desc: If this Pokemon is a Morpeko, it changes formes between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.

name: Quick Draw
description:
The Pokémon’s moves have a 30% chance of going first among
moves of the same priority.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s moves have a 30% chance of going first among
moves of the same priority.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.

name: Unseen Fist
description:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets
that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that
the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the
target’s protective effects is still triggered.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets
that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that
the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the
target’s protective effects is still triggered.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore the target's protection, except Max Guard.

name: Curious Medicine
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes all stat changes
from its allies.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes all stat changes
from its allies.
pkmn_shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon's allies have their stat stages reset to 0.

name: Purifying Salt
description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Ghost-type moves.
The Pokémon is immune to status conditions.
official_desc:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Ghost-type moves.
The Pokémon is immune to status conditions.
pkmn_shortDesc: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn. If a Pokemon uses a Ghost-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon.

name: Zero to Hero
description:
The Pokémon changes into its Hero Form when it switches out
of battle.
official_desc:
The Pokémon changes into its Hero Form when it switches out
of battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.

name: Electromorphosis
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it gains the
Electric Boost status.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it gains the
Electric Boost status.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from an attack.

name: Good as Gold
description: The Pokémon is immune to status moves used by other Pokémon.
official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to status moves used by other Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.

name: Opportunist
description:
When an opponent’s stats are boosted, the Pokémon boosts its
own stats in the exact same way.
official_desc:
When an opponent’s stats are boosted, the Pokémon boosts its
own stats in the exact same way.
pkmn_shortDesc: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.

name: Cud Chew
description:
If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will eat that same Berry once
more at the end of the next turn.
official_desc:
If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will eat that same Berry once
more at the end of the next turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon eats a Berry, it will eat that Berry again at the end of the next turn.

name: Sharpness
description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.
official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

name: Supreme Overlord
description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is
boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been
defeated in the battle already. The maximum boost is 50%.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is
boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been
defeated in the battle already. The maximum boost is 50%.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves have 10% more power for each fainted ally, up to 5 allies.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's moves have their power multiplied by 1+(X*0.1), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side when this Ability became active, and X cannot be greater than 5.

name: Toxic Debris
description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, it
gives the opponent’s side the Toxic Spikes status.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, it
gives the opponent’s side the Toxic Spikes status.
pkmn_shortDesc: If this Pokemon is hit by a physical attack, Toxic Spikes are set on the opposing side.

name: Armor Tail

Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the

official_desc:
Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the

pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
pkmn_desc: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

name: Earth Eater
description:
Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP.
official_desc:
Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP.

When the Pokémon enters a battle, opponents’ evasiveness is

name: Piercing Drill
description:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets
that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that
the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the
target’s protective effects is still triggered.
official_desc:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets

name: Dragonize
description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.
official_desc:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.

pkmn_desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

name: Eelevate
description:
The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to
Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes,
and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a
target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.
official_desc:
The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to
Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes,
and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a
target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to Ground; +1 to highest stat if it KOes another Pokemon.
pkmn_desc: This Pokemon is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability. The effects of Gravity, Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball nullify the immunity. Thousand Arrows can hit this Pokemon as if it did not have this Ability. This Pokemon's highest stat is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon. Stat stage changes are not considered. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order.

name: Mega Sol
description:
Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can
use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
official_desc:
Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can
use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
pkmn_shortDesc: This Pokemon's moves are used as if the effects of Sunny Day were active.
